name: Diabetes Screening
description: Number of PHCC visitors (40 years and above, BMI ≥ 25) screened for abnormal blood glucose at least once in the last 3 years
denominatorDescription: Total count of eligible targeted population

name: Obesity Screening
description: Number of PHCC visitors (2 years -and above) with a documented BMI during the physician encounter or during the previous twelve months
denominatorDescription: Total count of eligible targeted population

name: Hypertension Screening
description: Number of PHCC visitors 18 years and above with documented screening of hypertension
denominatorDescription: Total count of eligible targeted population

name: Breast Cancer Screening
description: Number of women aged 40−69 years with one or more mammograms during the measurement period or the 15 months prior to the measurement period
denominatorDescription: Total count of eligible targeted population

name: Colorectal Cancer Screening
description: Number of PHCCs visitors aged 45 years and above screened for colorectal cancer by fecal immunochemical test (FIT) during the measurement period or the two years prior to the measurement period
denominatorDescription: Total count of eligible targeted population

name: Premarital Screening
description: Number of individuals who completed the required premarital screening test

name: Mental Health Screening
description: Patients aged 18 years and older with documented screening for depression or anxiety on the date of the encounter or up to 12 months prior to the date of the encounter using an age-appropriate standardized tool
denominatorDescription: Total count of eligible targeted population

name: Newborn Screening
description: Number of newborns screened for genetic disorders

name: Dyslipidemia Screening
description: Number of PHCC visitors (40 years and above) who had a complete lipid profile performed for screening of dyslipidemia within 5 years prior to the end of reporting
denominatorDescription: Total count of eligible targeted population

name: Enrollment Rate for Top Five Diagnoses into Established Clinical Pathways
description: Number of patients enrolled within the pathway in accordance to enrollment calculation
denominatorDescription: Total number of patients discharged under the top five diagnosis

name: Patients Seen in Virtual Clinic
description: Total number of patients who were seen in the Virtual clinics

name: Days to Third Next Available Appointment
description: The average number of calendar days (including weekends) until the third next available appointment in outpatient clinics (all specialties including primary care if available)
denominatorDescription: The total number of sampled admitted patients within the assessment period

name: Hand Hygiene Compliance
description: The total number of compliant hand hygiene opportunities
denominatorDescription: The total number of HH opportunities observe

name: Patient Experience Score - HQI
description: Number of patients who respond, “strongly agree” to the statement, “They give me exactly the help I want [and need] exactly when I want [and need] it.

name: Overall Satisfaction with Complaint Resolution within 72 hours
description: Complaints who received a (satisfied, very satisfied) scoring on its  resolution/outcome by the patient, family, or others
denominatorDescription: Total number of responses to the complaints’ resolution survey

name: Percentage of Complaints Resolved Within 72 hours
description: Number of complaints resolved within 72 hours from filing/submission to communication of resolution

name: Nurse Vacancy Ratio
description: Number of vacant permanent nurse FTEs
denominatorDescription: Number of planned budgeted nurse workforce FTEs

name: Staff Satisfaction Score
description: Number of staff responding either 9 or 10 on the “How likely is it that you would recommend your place of work to a friend or acquaintance as a great place to work”
